languages.text: "Я... приношу вам извинения, гемункул. Уровень и глубина ваших знаний несопоставимы с моими, и я зря подвергал сомнению данный факт". {n}Манипулус смотрит в пол, избегая поднимать взгляд.{/n}
"I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Я... приношу вам извинения, гемункул. Уровень и глубина ваших знаний несопоставимы с моими, и я зря подвергал сомнению данный факт". {n}Манипулус смотрит в пол, избегая поднимать взгляд.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding his gaze.{/n}

"I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich ... möchte mich aufrichtig entschuldigen, Haemonculus. Eure Meisterschaft übersteigt die meine bei Weitem. Daran hätte ich nie zweifeln sollen." {n}Der Manipulus starrt auf den Boden und weicht dem Blick des Xenos aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Ich ... möchte mich aufrichtig entschuldigen, Haemonculus. Eure Meisterschaft übersteigt die meine bei Weitem. Daran hätte ich nie zweifeln sollen." {n}Der Manipulus starrt auf den Boden und weicht dem Blick des Xenos aus.{/n}

languages.text: « Je... souhaite vous présenter mes plus sincères excuses, hémoncule. Votre talent est largement supérieur au mien, et je n'aurais jamais dû remettre vos compétences en question. » {n}Le manipulus garde les yeux rivés au sol, évitant soigneusement le regard du xénos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Je... souhaite vous présenter mes plus sincères excuses, hémoncule. Votre talent est largement supérieur au mien, et je n'aurais jamais dû remettre vos compétences en question. » {n}Le manipulus garde les yeux rivés au sol, évitant soigneusement le regard du xénos.{/n}

languages.text: «Te... ofrezco mis más sinceras disculpas, Hemónculo. Tu maestría supera con creces la mía. Nunca debería haber disputado este hecho». {n}El manipulus mira al suelo, evitando los ojos del xenos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Te... ofrezco mis más sinceras disculpas, Hemónculo. Tu maestría supera con creces la mía. Nunca debería haber disputado este hecho». {n}El manipulus mira al suelo, evitando los ojos del xenos.{/n}

languages.text: "Sana... En içten özürlerimi sunuyorum Haimonkulus. Ustalığın benimkinin çok ötesinde, bundan asla şüphe etmemeliydim." {n}Manipülus yere bakıyor, zenonun gözlerinden kaçınıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sana... En içten özürlerimi sunuyorum Haimonkulus. Ustalığın benimkinin çok ötesinde, bundan asla şüphe etmemeliydim." {n}Manipülus yere bakıyor, zenonun gözlerinden kaçınıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “我……向你诚恳致歉，血伶人。你的造诣远在我之上，我不该对此有任何怀疑。”{n}操纵者盯着地面，回避异形的目光。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我……向你诚恳致歉，血伶人。你的造诣远在我之上，我不该对此有任何怀疑。”{n}操纵者盯着地面，回避异形的目光。{/n}

languages.text: 「私は……心からの謝罪を申し上げます、ハエモンクルス。あなたの熟達は、私のそれをはるかに凌いでいます。私はその事実を、決して疑うべきではありませんでした」{n}マニピュルスは床を見つめ、異種族の視線を避けている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I... offer my sincere apologies, Haemonculus. Your mastery is far beyond my own; I should never have doubted that fact." {n}The Manipulus stares at the floor, avoiding the xenos's gaze.{/n}
